authority.department: Labour Department, Andaman and Nicobar Administration

overview: Union Territory-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

rules.title: Review Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the applicable Shops and Establishments legislation is required.

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and prescribed notices under applicable labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and employee information required under applicable labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave and weekly holidays applicable in the Union Territory.

rules.title: Review Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure employee wages comply with the latest minimum wage notifications applicable in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

citations.reference: Andaman and Nicobar Administration Minimum Wage Notifications

rules.title: Monitor Labour Department Notifications
rules.description: Review notifications, circulars and compliance updates issued by the Andaman and Nicobar Administration.

citations.reference: Andaman and Nicobar Administration Labour Notifications

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering statutory registrations, payroll compliance, labour records and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for statutory filings, inspections, licence renewals and compliance due dates.
